commands.name: serve

options.name: --config-env-var
options.description:
The environment variable name pointing to the configuration
file.

options.name: --config-path
options.description: The path to the configuration file.

options.name: --server-name
options.description: The name of the server to use.

options.name: --spec-path
options.description:
The Path of the OpenAPI or Google Discovery
specification.

options.name: --spec-url
options.description:
The URL of the OpenAPI or Google Discovery
specification.

commands.description:
Starts the MCP server with the provided configuration or 
arguments.

commands.name: build
commands.description: Build a MCP server configuration file and more

commands.name: config

options.name: --ai-api-key
options.description:
Google Gemini API Key for the metadata
generation.

options.name: --ai-metadata
options.description:
Generate AI metadata for the methods and
parameters.

options.name: --api-type
options.description:
API Specification type OpenAPI (openapi) or Google
discovery (discovery).

options.name: --auth
options.description: The type of authentication to use.

options.name: --exclude-paths
options.description:
Exclude api paths from the generated
client.

options.name: --only-for-paths
options.description:
Only generate api paths for the specified
paths.

options.name: --output-path
options.description:
Output directory path for the generated
client.

options.name: --server-name
options.description: The name of the server to use.

options.name: --skip-auth-config
options.description:
Skip the authentication configuration at the end of
build.

options.name: --spec-path
options.description:
The Path of the OpenAPI or Google Discovery
specification.

options.name: --spec-url
options.description:
The URL of the OpenAPI or Google Discovery
specification.

commands.description:
Build MCP Server configurations from an OpenAPI or Google 
Discovery specification.

commands.description:
List available configuration options such as
